heading: Distribution of assets on dissolution or final liquidation
label: 40511 Distribution of assets on dissolution or final liquidation
text: On dissolution or final liquidation of the corporation, any assets remaining after the discharge of all liabilities shall be distributed as provided by the board of directors, but in compliance with the bylaws.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)4051136:805., , .Aug. 14, 1958Pub. L. 85–642, § 1572 Stat. 600The word “satisfaction” is omitted as included in “discharge”, and the word “obligations” is omitted as included in “liabilities”. The words “outstanding” and “all Federal and State laws applicable thereto” are omitted as unnecessary.
